caption: Table 9. Implementation of HPDMA1 channels
rows: Channel x (x = 0 to 11) is implemented with: – a FIFO of 16 bytes, 4 words, 2 double-words – fixed/contiguously incremented addressing These channels can be used for HPDMA transfers between an APB or AHB peripheral, an AHB/AXI SRAM, or CPU TCM.
Channel x (x = 12 to 15) is implemented with: – a FIFO of 64 bytes, 8 double-words – 2D addressing These channels can be also used for HPDMA transfers, including AXI external memories.
